subject: March 2026 Payslip Ready
body: Your March 2026 payslip is available. Please log in to view your payslip.

subject: April 2026 Payslip Ready
body: Your April 2026 payslip is available. Please log in to view your payslip.

subject: National Minimum Wage Update 2025/26
body: The National Minimum Wage has been updated to R25.42/hr effective 1 March 2025. Please ensure all pay structures are compliant.

subject: Leave Request Approved
body: Your leave request for 7–11 April 2026 has been approved.

subject: Leave Request Not Approved
body: Your leave request for 1–5 June 2026 could not be approved. Reason: Peak harvest period — insufficient cover.

subject: Contract Expiry Reminder
body: Reminder: Bongani Khumalo's fixed-term contract expired on 31 July 2024. Please renew or terminate the contract.
